dataNote: All spots sourced from YouTube gameplay videos. Each spot includes the source video URL.

spots.name: Sofa Corner Blend
spots.description: Paint yourself to match the sofa cushion pattern and pose in the corner. Works best when Seekers scan quickly.
spots.paintAdvice: Match the dominant sofa color. Use darker shades for shadow areas.
spots.poseTips: Crouch and angle yourself to match cushion shape.

spots.name: Behind the TV
spots.description: Squeeze behind the TV stand and paint yourself black/dark gray to blend with the electronics.
spots.paintAdvice: Use dark gray or black. Match the TV stand color if possible.
spots.poseTips: Stand still and align with the TV stand edge.

spots.name: Bookshelf Disguise
spots.description: Paint yourself with book spine colors and pose vertically against the shelf. High risk, high reward.
spots.paintAdvice: Use multiple colors to mimic book spines. Red, blue, green patterns work well.
spots.poseTips: Stand straight, arms at sides. Match the vertical line of books.

spots.name: Plant Pot Mimic
spots.description: Paint yourself green and crouch near the plant pot. Simple but surprisingly effective.
spots.paintAdvice: Match the leaf green. Add brown for the pot area.
spots.poseTips: Crouch low, curl up to mimic plant shape.

spots.name: Counter Top Blend
spots.description: Paint yourself to match the kitchen counter and stand flat against it.
spots.paintAdvice: Match counter tile color. Gray/beige tones work best.
spots.poseTips: Stand flat, arms at sides. Mimic cabinet shape.

spots.name: Fridge Door Shadow
spots.description: Hide in the shadow of the open fridge door area. Paint yourself white to match the fridge.
spots.paintAdvice: White or off-white to match fridge surface.
spots.poseTips: Stand in fridge alcove, match the vertical line.

spots.name: Bathtub Edge
spots.description: Paint yourself white and sit on the bathtub edge. Blend with the porcelain.
spots.paintAdvice: Pure white or light cream to match bathtub.
spots.poseTips: Sit on edge, lean slightly forward.

spots.name: Towel Rack Camouflage
spots.description: Paint yourself towel-colored and hang near the towel rack. Tricky but works in chaos.
spots.paintAdvice: Match towel colors - usually white, blue, or pastel.
spots.poseTips: Stand still, arms slightly out to mimic towel hanging.

spots.name: Wardrobe Shadow
spots.description: Stand in the shadow beside the wardrobe. Paint yourself dark to blend with the shadow.
spots.paintAdvice: Dark brown or black to match wardrobe shadow.
spots.poseTips: Stand flat against wall, minimize profile.

spots.name: Under the Bed
spots.description: Classic spot. Paint yourself dark and slide under the bed frame.
spots.paintAdvice: Dark gray or black. Match the bed frame underside.
spots.poseTips: Lie flat if possible, or crouch low.

spots.name: Box Stack Blend
spots.description: Paint yourself cardboard brown and stand among stacked boxes.
spots.paintAdvice: Cardboard brown / tan. Add tape-line details if skilled.

spots.name: Tool Wall Shadow
spots.description: Paint yourself dark and stand against the tool wall. Match the pegboard pattern.
spots.paintAdvice: Dark gray pegboard color. Match tool silhouettes if possible.
